deliberate_omissions: Error handling, retries, and failure behavior of the synchronization
Field mapping ownership and conflict rules
known_false_positives_rationale: The text states 'The objective is...' but the keyword list only contains 'objetivo'/'goal'/'outcome'/'resultado', so the gap fires anyway. Documented engine bug to fix in IMP-015.
target_fire_rationale: Words like 'api', 'endpoint', and 'integration' suppress the backend-surface and tech-deep-dive checks, yet contracts, failure behavior, and architecture input are genuinely missing.
